debug_info.goal:
f : ℕ+ → ℕ+
h₀ : f 1 = 1
h₁ : f 3 = 3
h₂ : ∀ (n : ℕ+), f (2 * n) = f n
h₃ : ∀ (n : ℕ+), f (4 * n + 1) + f n = 2 * f (2 * n + 1)
h₄ : ∀ (n : ℕ+), f (4 * n + 3) + 2 * f n = 3 * f (2 * n + 1)
A : Finset ↑{n | n ≤ 1988 ∧ f n = n}
⊢ A.card = Imo1988P3.solution

proof:
have f_rev : ∀ n : ℕ+, (f n : ℕ) = (n.val.bits 2).foldl (fun acc b => acc * 2 + b) 0 := by
    intro n
    induction n using PNat.strongInductionOn
    rename_i n ih
    rcases n with ⟨_ | n, n_pos⟩; · exact (n_pos.ne rfl).elim
    let n' : ℕ+ := ⟨n + 1, n.succ_pos⟩
    cases' n' with n val_pos
    by_cases h_even : 2 ∣ n
    · rcases h_even with ⟨k, rfl⟩
      have : k < n := by apply Nat.div_lt_self val_pos; norm_num
      have k_pos : 0 < k := by apply Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_left; exact val_pos; norm_num
      rw [h₂ ⟨k, k_pos⟩, ih ⟨k, k_pos⟩ this]
      simp [Nat.bits, Nat.bits_append_bit, Nat.bit0]
    · rcases Nat.exists_eq_add_of_not_le (Nat.not_le_of_gt (Nat.one_pos)) with ⟨m, rfl⟩
      by_cases h_mod : n % 4 = 1
      · rcases (by
          have : n % 4 = 1 := h_mod
          have : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 1 := by rw [Nat.div_add_mod n 4, h_mod]
          exact ⟨n / 4, this⟩) with ⟨k, rfl⟩
        have k_pos : 0 < k := by
          by_contra k_zero; subst k_zero; norm_num at val_pos
        let nk : ℕ+ := ⟨k, k_pos⟩
        let n2k1 : ℕ+ := ⟨2 * k + 1, by norm_num⟩
        have : f (4 * nk + 1) = 2 * f n2k1 - f nk := by
          rw [← h₃ nk, add_comm]; apply Nat.add_sub_cancel
        rw [this, ih n2k1 (by linarith), ih nk (by linarith)]
        sorry
      · rcases (by
          have : n % 4 = 3 := by
            cases' Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one n with h_e h_o
            · contradiction
            · have : n % 4 = 1 ∨ n % 4 = 3 := by
                have := Nat.mod_lt n (by norm_num : 0 < 4)
                interval_cases (n % 4) <;> simp_all [Nat.mod_mod_of_dvd]
              cases' this with h1 h3; contradiction; exact h3
          have : n = 4 * (n / 4) + 3 := by rw [Nat.div_add_mod n 4, this]
          exact ⟨n / 4, this⟩) with ⟨k, rfl⟩
        have k_pos : 0 < k ∨ k = 0 := Nat.zero_le k
        let nk : ℕ+ := ⟨k, k_pos.by_cases (id) (fun _ => ⟨1, by norm_num⟩)⟩
        sorry
  have f_eq_n : ∀ n : ℕ+, f n = n ↔ (n.val.bits 2).reverse = n.val.bits 2 := by
    intro n
    rw [PNat.ext_iff, f_rev n]
    let bits := n.val.bits 2
    have : bits.foldl (fun acc b => acc * 2 + b) 0 = bits.reverse.foldr (fun b acc => acc * 2 + b) 0 := by
      rw [List.foldl_eq_foldr_reverse]; rfl
    sorry
  have : A.card = 92 := by
    sorry
  exact this

debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∃ s, s.Infinite ∧ s.Pairwise fun m n => (2 ^ ↑n - 3).Coprime (2 ^ ↑m - 3)

proof:
let rec f : ℕ → ℕ+
    | 0 => 3
    | n + 1 =>
      let M := (Finset.range (n + 1)).prod (fun i ↦ 2 ^ (f i).val - 3)
      ⟨Nat.totient M, by
        have hM : M ≥ 5 := by
          induction n with
          | zero => simp [f]; rfl
          | succ n ih =>
            rw [Finset.prod_range_succ]
            apply Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right
            exact Nat.pos_of_gt ih
        exact (Nat.totient_pos (Nat.pos_of_gt hM)).ne'⟩
  use Set.range f
  constructor
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro m n hmn
    by_contra h
    wlog hlt : m < n
    · exact this n m hmn.symm (Ne.symm h) (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.not_lt.1 hlt) (Ne.symm h))
    let M := (Finset.range n).prod (fun i ↦ 2 ^ (f i).val - 3)
    have hfm : (2 ^ (f m).val - 3) ∣ M := Finset.dvd_prod_of_mem (fun i ↦ 2 ^ (f i).val - 3) (Finset.mem_range.2 hlt)
    have hC : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (f n).val - 3) M := by
      have hf_def : (f n).val = Nat.totient M := by cases n; contradiction; rfl
      have hM_odd : M % 2 = 1 := by
        apply Finset.prod_induction (fun x ↦ x % 2 = 1) <;> intros <;>
        simp [Nat.mul_mod, *]
        have : 2 ^ (f a).val % 2 = 0 := Nat.pow_mod_eq_zero _ _ (f a).2
        rw [Nat.sub_mod_eq_mod_sub (Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (f a).2), this]
        rfl
      have h2M : Nat.Coprime 2 M := Nat.coprime_two_left.2 hM_odd
      have h_mod : (2 ^ (f n).val) % M = 1 % M := by
        rw [hf_def, Nat.pow_totient_mod _ h2M]
      have h_mod_3 : (2 ^ (f n).val - 3 : ℤ) % (M : ℤ) = -2 % (M : ℤ) := by
        rw [Int.sub_mod, ← Nat.cast_pow, h_mod]; rfl
      have h_gcd : (2 ^ (f n).val - 3 : ℤ).gcd M = ((-2 : ℤ) % M).gcd M := Int.gcd_mod_left _ _
      rw [Int.gcd_eq_nat_gcd] at h_gcd
      have h_gcd_nat : Nat.gcd (2 ^ (f n).val - 3) M = Nat.gcd 2 M := by
        have : (-2 : ℤ) % (M : ℤ) = (M : ℤ) - 2 := by
          apply Int.emod_eq_of_lt <;> linarith [show (M : ℤ) ≥ 5 from Nat.cast_le.2 (by
            induction n with
            | zero => linarith
            | succ n ih =>
              rw [Finset.prod_range_succ]
              apply Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right
              exact Nat.pos_of_gt ih))]
        rw [this, ← Int.gcd_eq_nat_gcd, Int.gcd_comm, Int.gcd_sub_self_left, Int.gcd_neg_right, Int.gcd_eq_nat_gcd]
        rfl
      rw [h_gcd_nat, Nat.gcd_comm, (Nat.coprime_two_left.2 hM_odd).gcd_eq_one]
    have h_gcd_1 : (2 ^ (f n).val - 3).Coprime (2 ^ (f m).val - 3) := Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right hfm hC
    rw [h] at h_gcd_1
    have : 2 ^ (f n).val - 3 = 1 := h_gcd_1.gcd_eq_one ▸ Nat.gcd_self (2 ^ (f n).val - 3)
    have : (f n).val = 2 := by linarith [show 2 ^ (f n).val = 4 by linarith]
    have hf_ge : (f n).val ≥ 4 := by
      cases n with
      | zero => linarith
      | succ n =>
        apply Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ
        have hM' : M ≥ 5 := by
          induction n with
          | zero => simp [f]; rfl
          | succ n ih => rw [Finset.prod_range_succ]; apply Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right; exact Nat.pos_of_gt ih
        exact Nat.totient_pos (Nat.pos_of_gt hM')
    linarith
  · intro m hm n hn hmn
    obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := hm
    obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := hn
    rw [hi, hj]
    wlog hlt : i < j
    · exact (this hn hm hn hm (Ne.symm hmn) hj hi (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.not_lt.1 hlt) (Ne.symm (fun h ↦ hmn (hj ▸ hi ▸ h ▸ rfl))))).symm
    let M := (Finset.range j).prod (fun k ↦ 2 ^ (f k).val - 3)
    have hfi : (2 ^ (f i).val - 3) ∣ M := Finset.dvd_prod_of_mem _ (Finset.mem_range.2 hlt)
    have hC : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (f j).val - 3) M := by
      have hf_def : (f j).val = Nat.totient M := by cases j; contradiction; rfl
      have hM_odd : M % 2 = 1 := by
        apply Finset.prod_induction (fun x ↦ x % 2 = 1) <;> intros <;> simp [Nat.mul_mod, *]
        have : 2 ^ (f a).val % 2 = 0 := Nat.pow_mod_eq_zero _ _ (f a).2
        rw [Nat.sub_mod_eq_mod_sub (Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (f a).2), this]; rfl
      rw [hf_def, ← Int.natAbs_gcd, Int.gcd_mod_left]
      have : (2 ^ Nat.totient M - 3 : ℤ) % M = (1 - 3 : ℤ) % M := by
        rw [Int.emod_sub, ← Nat.cast_pow, Nat.pow_totient_mod _ (Nat.coprime_two_left.2 hM_odd)]; rfl
      rw [this, ← Int.gcd_mod_left, Int.gcd_eq_nat_gcd]
      exact (Nat.coprime_two_left.2 hM_odd).symm
    exact Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right hfi hC

end Imo1971P3

x a : Fin 4 → ℝ
h₀ : Function.Injective a
h₁ : ∀ (i : Fin 4), ∑ j, |a i - a j| * x j = 1
⊢ (x 0, x 1, x 2, x 3) = Imo1966P5.solution_fun (a 0, a 1, a 2, a 3)

proof:
obtain ⟨σ, hσ⟩ := Tuple.exists_equiv_comp_strictMono a
  let b := a ∘ σ; let y := x ∘ σ
  have h_eq (i : Fin 4) : ∑ j, |b i - b j| * y j = 1 := by
    specialize h₁ (σ i); rw [← h₁, ← σ.sum_comp]; simp [b, y, Function.comp_apply]
  have h_abs (i j : Fin 4) : |b i - b j| = if i < j then b j - b i else b i - b j := by
    split_ifs with h; exacts [abs_of_neg (sub_neg.2 (hσ h)), abs_of_nonneg (sub_nonneg.2 (hσ.monotone (le_of_not_lt h)))]
  have h0 := h_eq 0; have h1 := h_eq 1; have h2 := h_eq 2; have h3 := h_eq 3
  simp [Fin.sum_univ_four, h_abs] at h0 h1 h2 h3
  have y_eq : y 1 = 0 ∧ y 2 = 0 ∧ y 0 = 1 / (b 3 - b 0) ∧ y 3 = 1 / (b 3 - b 0) := by
    have h01 : (b 1 - b 0) * (y 1 + y 2 + y 3 - y 0) = 0 := by linarith
    have h12 : (b 2 - b 1) * (y 2 + y 3 - y 0 - y 1) = 0 := by linarith
    have h23 : (b 3 - b 2) * (y 3 - y 0 - y 1 - y 2) = 0 := by linarith
    have y0123 : y 1 + y 2 + y 3 - y 0 = 0 := by nlinarith [hσ (by decide : (0 : Fin 4) < 1)]
    have y1230 : y 2 + y 3 - y 0 - y 1 = 0 := by nlinarith [hσ (by decide : (1 : Fin 4) < 2)]
    have y2301 : y 3 - y 0 - y 1 - y 2 = 0 := by nlinarith [hσ (by decide : (2 : Fin 4) < 3)]
    have y1z : y 1 = 0 := by linarith; have y2z : y 2 = 0 := by linarith
    have y03 : y 0 = y 3 := by linarith
    have y3sol : y 3 = 1 / (b 3 - b 0) := by
      field_simp [sub_eq_zero.not.2 (ne_of_gt (hσ (by decide : (0 : Fin 4) < 3)))]
      linarith [h0, y1z, y2z, y03]
    exact ⟨y1z, y2z, by linarith, y3sol⟩
  let s := [a 0, a 1, a 2, a 3]
  have ai_eq : Option.get (List.min? s) rfl = b 0 := by
    have : s = [b (σ.symm 0), b (σ.symm 1), b (σ.symm 2), b (σ.symm 3)] := by simp [b]
    rw [this]; simpa using (hσ.monotone.map_min (Finset.univ.min_idx (σ.symm 0))).symm
  have al_eq : Option.get (List.max? s) rfl = b 3 := by
    have : s = [b (σ.symm 0), b (σ.symm 1), b (σ.symm 2), b (σ.symm 3)] := by simp [b]
    rw [this]; simpa using (hσ.monotone.map_max (Finset.univ.max_idx (σ.symm 0))).symm
  have i_eq : s.findIdx (· = b 0) = (σ 0).val := by
    have : s.get (σ 0).val = b 0 := by simp [b]
    exact List.findIdx_eq_get h₀.comp_equiv rfl this
  have l_eq : s.findIdx (· = b 3) = (σ 3).val := by
    have : s.get (σ 3).val = b 3 := by simp [b]
    exact List.findIdx_eq_get h₀.comp_equiv rfl this
  simp [solution_fun, ai_eq, al_eq, i_eq, l_eq]; ext k; fin_cases k

    obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := σ.surjective k; subst hj
    simp [y, y_eq]; fin_cases j <;> simp [y_eq]

  have h_idx : findIdx p ps < ps.length := findIdx_lt_length_of_exists ⟨L.flatten.length, h_ps, h⟩
  have h_idx_pos : findIdx p ps ≠ 0 := by
    rw [findIdx_ne_zero_iff]
    · exact ⟨⟨L.flatten.length, h_ps, h⟩, by simp [partialSums]⟩
  have h_gt : i < ps[j + 1] := by
    have : j + 1 = findIdx p ps := by omega
    rw [this]; exact getElem_findIdx_prop h_idx
  have h_le : ps[j] ≤ i := le_of_not_gt (findIdx_min (by omega))
  simp [ps, getElem_partialSums, length_flatten, map_take, hj, sum_take_succ] at h_gt h_le
  omega

      contrapose! hx; exact B.repr.injective (B.repr.map_zero.symm ▸ funext hx)
    exact ⟨(B.coord i).toAddMonoidHom, (ZMod.ne_zero_iff_one _).mp hi⟩

            right_inv := fun φ ↦ by ext; simp }
  have h2 : Nat.card (G →+ ZMod 2) = 2 * Nat.card { φ | φ x = 1 } := by
    rw [← Nat.card_sum, Nat.card_congr (Equiv.Set.sumCompl { φ | φ x = 1 }).symm, Nat.card_sum, h1, ← two_mul]

  rw [card_of_dual] at h2
  exact (Nat.mul_div_cancel_left _ (by norm_num)).symm.trans (congrArg (· / 2) h2)

    · simp (config := {contextual := true}) [card_of_dual_constrained, Nat.cast_mul, ← Nat.card_eq_finsetCard]
    · intro x hx; simp at hx; simp [hx]
  obtain ⟨φ, _, hφ⟩ := Finset.exists_ge_of_sum_ge Finset.univ_nonempty f
  use φ; rw [hf, card_of_dual, Nat.card_eq_fintype_card] at hφ

      exact (Nat.card_mono (Set.toFinite _) this).trans (Nat.card_insert_le 0 (A \ {0}))))
